daily_orders.day: Business date: ord partition column, always filter on this [PART]
daily_orders.order_placed_at: TS: ord was placed use for window functions and inter-ord gap
daily_orders.city: abbreviaton of City of del e.g. Dxb for dubai etc
daily_orders.Customer_hub: Del hub within city e.g. DXB-HUB1
daily_orders.GMV: Gross merchandise value in AED basket before any fees [SUM(GMV)]
daily_orders.restaurant_code: rest code join key to outlet_status_complete
daily_orders.Promo_name: Promotion applied. NULL means no promo
daily_orders.credit_card_mask: Masked credit card first 6 digits = BIN code for bank identification
daily_orders.is_vip_customer: Cust is a noon one (VIP subscription) member
daily_orders.cancellation_reason: Reason for cancellation only populated for canceled orders
daily_orders.Outlet_acceptance_time: Time taken by outlet to accept ord
daily_orders.Kitchen_time: Time spent in kitchen to prepare
daily_orders.Payment_processing_time_before_DA_initia: Payment processing before del agent initiation
daily_orders.DA_time_to_restaurant: Del agent travel time to rest
daily_orders.DA_wait_at_outlet: Del agent wait time at outlet
daily_orders.DA_time_taken_to_reach_customer: Del agent travel time to cust
daily_orders.DA_wait_at_customer: Del agent wait time for cust
daily_orders.delivery_type: Type of del default or self_pickup
daily_orders.initial_customer_delivery_shown: Initial del ETA shown to cust
daily_orders.phone_code_hash: Hashed phone country or area code for cust
daily_orders.Order_payer_code: payment done like cust, channel, none_on_cx

food_order_finance.order_nr: Public ord number joins to reporting.daily_orders.order_id
food_order_finance.channel_code: Channel through which ord was placed (e.g., noon)
food_order_finance.country_code: Country code filter country_code = 'ae' for UAE
food_order_finance.order_pay_to_restaurant: Net amount payable to rest after commission
food_order_finance.target_fee_models: Fee model configuration applied to this ord
food_order_finance.order_state_snapshot: Full ord state snapshot including payment breakdown, logistics status, outlet info, menu info
food_order_finance.items: Array of ord items with modifiers and pricing
food_order_finance.created_at: Partition column ALWAYS filter on this [PART]

task_timestamp.logistics_ota_assigned_at: OTA assigned TS (string convert to TS if needed)
task_timestamp.logistics_ready_to_pickup_at: TS: ord was marked ready for pickup
task_timestamp.logistics_arrived_delivery_location_at: TS: rider arrived at del location
task_timestamp.logistics_handed_over_at: TS: ord was handed to cust
task_timestamp.created_at: Partition column ALWAYS filter on this [PART]

task_misc.id_task: Logistics task ID join to task.id_task
task_misc.task_channel: Channel from which logistics task originated

task.id_task: Primary logistics task ID join to task_timestamp.id_task
task.order_ref_nr: Ord reference number joins to reporting.daily_orders.order_id
task.id_country: Country ID prefer filtering via daily_orders.country
task.created_at: Partition column ALWAYS filter on this [PART]

food_order_extra.id_food_order_extra: Primary key of ord extra record
food_order_extra.order_nr: Ord reference number joins to reporting.daily_orders.order_id
food_order_extra.created_at: Partition column ALWAYS filter to avoid full table scan [PART]
food_order_extra.menu_info: Serialized JSON snapshot of menu at time of ord
food_order_extra.outlet_info: Serialized outlet snapshot at ord time
food_order_extra.sla_info: Del SLA distance and time breakdown
food_order_extra.customer_state: Cust state snapshot at time of ord

mpnoon_food_order.id_food_order: Primary key unique food ord ID
mpnoon_food_order.order_nr: Human-readable ord number shown to customers
mpnoon_food_order.payment_method_code: Payment method used (e.g., postpaid, card, wallet)
mpnoon_food_order.subscription_id: Subscription ID if ord placed under a subscription plan
mpnoon_food_order.is_credit_card_used: Flag 1 if credit card was used
mpnoon_food_order.credit_card_mask: Masked credit card number for display
mpnoon_food_order.outlet_version: Version outlet record at time of ord
mpnoon_food_order.menu_version: Version menu at time of ord
mpnoon_food_order.address_version: Version address record at time of ord
mpnoon_food_order.fleet_code: Fleet assigned to deliver this ord
mpnoon_food_order.external_logistics_code: External logistics provider code if applicable
mpnoon_food_order.id_logistics_task: Logistics task ID join to task_misc.id_task for logistics detail
mpnoon_food_order.fleet_group_code: Group code for fleet (e.g., UAE, KSA)
mpnoon_food_order.country_code: Country use 'ae' for UAE, 'sa' for KSA. Always filter on this
mpnoon_food_order.delivery_preference: Cust del preference (e.g., leave at door)
mpnoon_food_order.customer_service_code: Cust service tier or code associated with ord
mpnoon_food_order.order_subtotal: Ord subtotal before discounts and fees
mpnoon_food_order.order_rider_tip: Tip amount given to del rider
mpnoon_food_order.order_payment_amount: Final amount paid by cust use for GMV calculations
mpnoon_food_order.customer_vat_invoice_nr: VAT invoice number issued to cust
mpnoon_food_order.order_payment_cash_collected: Cash collected from cust for COD orders
mpnoon_food_order.order_issued_credit: Credit issued to cust for this ord
mpnoon_food_order.order_collect_from_customer: Amount to be collected from cust
mpnoon_food_order.logistics_status_history: JSON string of logistics status change history
mpnoon_food_order.id_status_order: Overall ord status ID filter on 14 for delivered orders
mpnoon_food_order.prepaid_payment_method_code: Payment method code for prepaid orders
mpnoon_food_order.gmaps_last_mile_time: Google Maps estimated last mile time in seconds
mpnoon_food_order.gmaps_last_mile_distance: Google Maps estimated last mile distance in meters
mpnoon_food_order.osrm_last_mile_time: OSRM estimated last mile time in seconds
mpnoon_food_order.osrm_last_mile_distance: OSRM estimated last mile distance in meters
mpnoon_food_order.distance_service_last_mile_time: Distance service estimated last mile time
mpnoon_food_order.distance_service_last_mile_distance: Distance service estimated last mile distance
mpnoon_food_order.estimated_da_assigned_at: Estimated time DA was assigned to ord
mpnoon_food_order.estimated_da_picked_up_at: Estimated time DA picked up ord
mpnoon_food_order.estimated_ready_at: Estimated time ord was ready for pickup
mpnoon_food_order.estimated_outlet_picked_up_at: Estimated time outlet handed over ord
mpnoon_food_order.estimated_delivery_at: Estimated del time shown to operations
mpnoon_food_order.original_estimated_delivery_at: Original estimated del time before any updates
mpnoon_food_order.consumer_estimated_delivery_at: Estimated del time shown to cust
mpnoon_food_order.created_at: Ord creation TS partition column, always filter on this
mpnoon_food_order.da_arrival_time: Actual DA arrival time at cust location
mpnoon_food_order.da_arrival_distance: Actual DA arrival distance at cust location
mpnoon_food_order.id_logistics_batch: Batch ID if ord was part of a logistics batch
mpnoon_food_order.order_small_order_fee: Small ord surcharge applied when subtotal is below threshold
mpnoon_food_order.order_long_distance_fee: Surcharge applied for long distance deliveries
mpnoon_food_order.is_vip: Flag 1 if this is a VIP ord
mpnoon_food_order.is_payment_settled: Flag 1 if payment has been settled
mpnoon_food_order.high_load_buffer: Buffer time added during high load periods
mpnoon_food_order.customer_segments: Cust segment tags at time of ord
mpnoon_food_order.is_vip_customer: Flag 1 if cust is a VIP cust
mpnoon_food_order.is_vip_outlet: Flag 1 if outlet is a VIP outlet
mpnoon_food_order.da_vehicle_type: Vehicle type used by del agent
mpnoon_food_order.restaurant_code: Rest code join to outlet_status_complete for outlet metadata
mpnoon_food_order.schedule_at: Scheduled del time if ord is scheduled
mpnoon_food_order.is_live_activity_enabled: Flag 1 if live activity tracking is enabled for this ord
mpnoon_food_order.order_refund_to_wallet: Refund amount credited back to cust wallet
mpnoon_food_order.customer_device_id: Device ID cust at time of ord
mpnoon_food_order.order_donation_amount: Donation amount added by cust to ord
mpnoon_food_order.receiver_info: Receiver information if ord is a gift or delivered to someone else
mpnoon_food_order.external_card_code: External card ID used for payment
mpnoon_food_order.internal_card_code: Internal card ID used for payment
mpnoon_food_order.order_postpaid_fee: Fee charged for postpaid payment method
mpnoon_food_order.id_partner: Partner ID associated with ord if applicable

temp_outlet_status.outlet_code: outlet ID primary key, use for joins
temp_outlet_status.restaurant_code: Parent rest ID join to daily_orders.restaurant_code
temp_outlet_status.outlet_status: Current publish status outlet (e.g. Published, Unpublished)
temp_outlet_status.active_inactive: Whether outlet is currently Active or Inactive
temp_outlet_status.accepts_orders_at: Timestamp from which outlet started accepting orders
temp_outlet_status.Outlet_Published: Flag indicating if outlet is currently published (1 = yes)
temp_outlet_status.last_Outlet_active: Flag of last active state for outlet
temp_outlet_status.last_Outlet_reject_msg: Last rejection message for outlet if unpublished/rejected
temp_outlet_status.Outlet_deleted: Flag indicating if outlet has been deleted (1 = deleted)
temp_outlet_status.outlet_country: Country code outlet filter 'ae' for UAE, 'sa' for KSA
temp_outlet_status.is_consumer_visible: Whether outlet is visible to consumers on platform
temp_outlet_status.is_serviceable: Flag indicating if outlet is serviceable (1 = yes)
temp_outlet_status.avg_prep_time: Average food preparation time in minutes
temp_outlet_status.all_cuisines: All cuisines offered by outlet as an array/list
temp_outlet_status.CRM_Cuisine: Cuisine classification used in CRM systems
temp_outlet_status.Menu_Published: Flag indicating if menu is currently published (1 = yes)
temp_outlet_status.menu_active: Flag indicating if menu is active
temp_outlet_status.last_menu_published: Flag of last menu published state
temp_outlet_status.Menu_deleted: Flag indicating if menu has been deleted (1 = deleted)
temp_outlet_status.Images_Percent: Percentage of menu items with images (as string)
temp_outlet_status.Images_Present: Numeric score/ratio of images present on menu

daily_rca.day: Date: aggregated metrics partition column, always filter on this
daily_rca.country: Country code 'ae' for UAE, 'sa' for KSA. Always filter by this column
daily_rca.food_sessions: Total food platform sessions for day
daily_rca.bounced_sessions: Sessions where user left without any action
daily_rca.moved_sessions: Sessions where user navigated away from noon food to another platform
daily_rca.Relevant_Sessions: Sessions that progressed beyond bounce all customers
daily_rca.New_FF_Sessions: First Food channel sessions new customers
daily_rca.Repeat_FF_Sessions: First Food channel sessions repeat customers
daily_rca.New_N2F_Sessions: Noon to Food channel sessions new customers
daily_rca.Repeat_N2F_Sessions: Noon to Food channel sessions repeat customers
daily_rca.New_DM_Sessions: Direct Marketing channel sessions new customers
daily_rca.Repeat_DM_Sessions: Direct Marketing channel sessions repeat customers
daily_rca.Rel_OA: Relevant sessions Outlet Awareness funnel step, all customers
daily_rca.Rel_PI: Relevant sessions Page Item (menu browse) funnel step, all customers
daily_rca.Rel_IC: Relevant sessions Item Click funnel step, all customers
daily_rca.Rel_ATC: Relevant sessions Add to Cart funnel step, all customers
daily_rca.Rel_C: Relevant sessions Checkout funnel step, all customers

daily_rca.Rel_Txn2: Transactions from relevant sessions secondary/alternate transaction count

daily_rca.Reln_ATC: Relevant new cust sessions Add to Cart funnel step
daily_rca.Reln_C: Relevant new cust sessions Checkout funnel step

daily_rca.Reln_Txn2: Transactions from relevant new cust sessions secondary count
daily_rca.Relr_OA: Relevant repeat cust sessions Outlet Awareness funnel step
daily_rca.Relr_PI: Relevant repeat cust sessions Page Item funnel step
daily_rca.Relr_IC: Relevant repeat cust sessions Item Click funnel step
daily_rca.Relr_ATC: Relevant repeat cust sessions Add to Cart funnel step
daily_rca.Relr_C: Relevant repeat cust sessions Checkout funnel step
daily_rca.Relr_Txn: Transactions from relevant repeat cust sessions primary count
daily_rca.Relr_Txn2: Transactions from relevant repeat cust sessions secondary count

mp_order_base_mat.order_nr: ord ID primary key, use for joins with daily_orders
mp_order_base_mat.ops_order_date: Operational date: ord partition column, REQUIRED in all queries. May differ from order_date for late-night orders
mp_order_base_mat.order_date: Calendar date when ord was placed by cust
mp_order_base_mat.order_status: Final ord status filter 'delivered' for time/GMV metrics, IN ('delivered','canceled') for cancel ratio
mp_order_base_mat.outlet_status: Outlet-side status at time of ord
mp_order_base_mat.cancellation_reason: Reason for ord cancellation if applicable
mp_order_base_mat.reason_code: Coded reason for cancellation or exception
mp_order_base_mat.msg: Additional message or note on ord status
mp_order_base_mat.country_code: Country code 'ae' for UAE, 'sa' for KSA. Always filter by this column
mp_order_base_mat.fleet_group_code: Fleet group assigned to deliver ord
mp_order_base_mat.external_oms_code: External ord management system code (e.g. limetray, americana)
mp_order_base_mat.batch_id: Batch ID if ord was part of a batched del run
mp_order_base_mat.id_task: Logistics task ID join to task tables
mp_order_base_mat.order_subtotal: Ord subtotal before discounts and fees
mp_order_base_mat.order_small_order_fee: Small ord fee charged if ord is below minimum threshold
mp_order_base_mat.order_long_distance_fee: Additional fee charged for long distance deliveries
mp_order_base_mat.order_outlet_adjustment: Manual adjustment applied at outlet level
mp_order_base_mat.is_fast_delivery: Flag indicating if ord was a fast/express del
mp_order_base_mat.is_fragile: Flag indicating if ord contains fragile items
mp_order_base_mat.sla_range: SLA bucket/range ord falls into (e.g. <1792 seconds)
mp_order_base_mat.dayofweek: Day of week number (1=Monday or 1=Sunday depending on config)
mp_order_base_mat.hour: Hour of day when ord was placed (0-23)
mp_order_base_mat.gmaps_last_mile_distance: Last mile distance in km from Google Maps
mp_order_base_mat.osrm_last_mile_distance: Last mile distance in km from OSRM routing engine
mp_order_base_mat.osrm_last_mile_time: Last mile time in seconds from OSRM routing engine
mp_order_base_mat.gmaps_last_mile_time: Last mile time in seconds from Google Maps
mp_order_base_mat.distance_service_last_mile_distance: Last mile distance from distance service
mp_order_base_mat.distance_service_last_mile_time: Last mile time in seconds from distance service
mp_order_base_mat.A2P_distance: Distance from DA arrival at rest to pickup in km
mp_order_base_mat.P2D_distance: Distance from pickup to del in km
mp_order_base_mat.Ar2Outlet_distance: Distance from DA arrival point to outlet in km
mp_order_base_mat.P2Outlet_distance: Distance from pickup point to outlet in km
mp_order_base_mat.load_factor_creation: Fleet load factor at time of ord creation
mp_order_base_mat.load_factor_assignment: Fleet load factor at time of DA assignment
mp_order_base_mat.est_O2D_cosumer: Estimated O2D time shown to consumer in seconds (note: typo in source 'cosumer')
mp_order_base_mat.est_O2D_consumer: Estimated O2D time shown to consumer in seconds
mp_order_base_mat.est_O2P: Estimated ord to pickup time in seconds
mp_order_base_mat.est_P2D: Estimated pickup to del time in seconds
mp_order_base_mat.est_O2D: Estimated ord to del time in seconds (logistics estimate)
mp_order_base_mat.da_assignment_time: Time in seconds from ord placed to DA assignment
mp_order_base_mat.acceptance_time: Time in seconds for rest to accept ord
mp_order_base_mat.first_mile_time: Time in seconds for first mile (DA travel to outlet)
mp_order_base_mat.prep_time: Rest food preparation time in seconds
mp_order_base_mat.last_mile_time: Time in seconds for last mile (pickup to del)
mp_order_base_mat.handover_time: Time in seconds for handover at rest
mp_order_base_mat.outlet_extra_time: Extra time added due to outlet delay in seconds
mp_order_base_mat.zone_extra_time: Extra time added due to del zone conditions in seconds
mp_order_base_mat.da_pickup_time: Time in seconds from DA arrival to pickup
mp_order_base_mat.outlet_pickup_time: Time in seconds from ord acceptance to DA pickup at outlet
mp_order_base_mat.O2A: Actual time in seconds: Ord placed to rest Acceptance
mp_order_base_mat.A2C: Actual time in seconds: Acceptance to DA Assignment Confirmation
mp_order_base_mat.C2Ar: Actual time in seconds: DA Confirmation to DA Arrival at rest
mp_order_base_mat.Ar2P: Actual time in seconds: DA Arrival at rest to Pickup
mp_order_base_mat.P2R: Actual time in seconds: Pickup to DA Reached destination
mp_order_base_mat.R2D: Actual time in seconds: DA Reached destination to Delivered
mp_order_base_mat.O2P: Actual time in seconds: Ord placed to Pickup
mp_order_base_mat.P2D: Actual time in seconds: Pickup to Delivered
mp_order_base_mat.O2D: Actual del time in seconds: Ord placed to Delivered primary SLA metric
mp_order_base_mat.C2D: Actual time in seconds: DA Confirmation to Delivered
mp_order_base_mat.O2Ar: Actual time in seconds: Ord placed to DA Arrival at rest
mp_order_base_mat.O2PA: Actual time in seconds: Ord placed to Pending Assignment
mp_order_base_mat.PA2A: Actual time in seconds: Pending Assignment to Assignment
mp_order_base_mat.A2RFP: Actual time in seconds: Assignment to Ready For Pickup signal
mp_order_base_mat.RFP2P: Actual time in seconds: Ready For Pickup to Pickup
mp_order_base_mat.O2D_breach_logistics: Flag (1) if O2D SLA was breached logistics perspective
mp_order_base_mat.O2D_breach_consumer: Flag (1) if O2D SLA was breached consumer-facing estimate perspective
mp_order_base_mat.A2C_breach: Flag (1) if A2C stage breached SLA
mp_order_base_mat.C2Ar_breach: Flag (1) if C2Ar stage breached SLA
mp_order_base_mat.Ar2P_breach: Flag (1) if Ar2P stage breached SLA
mp_order_base_mat.P2R_breach: Flag (1) if P2R stage breached SLA
mp_order_base_mat.R2D_breach: Flag (1) if R2D stage breached SLA
mp_order_base_mat.O2P_breach: Flag (1) if O2P stage breached SLA
mp_order_base_mat.P2D_breach: Flag (1) if P2D stage breached SLA
mp_order_base_mat.cpos_base: Base CPOS (cost per ord score) value
mp_order_base_mat.original_estimated_delivery_at: Original ETA shown to cust at ord placement
mp_order_base_mat.consumer_estimated_delivery_at: Updated ETA shown to consumer during del
mp_order_base_mat.placed_at: TS: ord was placed by cust
mp_order_base_mat.pending_accepted_at: TS: ord entered pending acceptance state
mp_order_base_mat.rfp_at: TS: rest marked ord as Ready For Pickup
mp_order_base_mat.pending_assignment_at: TS: ord entered pending DA assignment state
mp_order_base_mat.assigned_at: TS: DA was assigned to ord
mp_order_base_mat.delivered_at: TS: ord was delivered to cust
mp_order_base_mat.created_at: TS: ord record was created (local timezone)
mp_order_base_mat.created_at_utc: TS: ord record was created in UTC
mp_order_base_mat.updated_at: TS: ord record was last updated
mp_order_base_mat.arrived_geopin: Geolocation pin when DA arrived at rest
mp_order_base_mat.reached_geopin: Geolocation pin when DA reached destination

session_zone.sessionid: session ID use COUNT(DISTINCT sessionid) for session count [COUNT_DIST]

order_discount.discount_code: Promo or discount code applied to ord
order_discount.applied_value: Total discount value applied to ord (usually negative value)
order_discount.channel_funded_value: Portion of discount funded by marketing/channel
order_discount.outlet_funded_value: Portion of discount funded by outlet/rest

outlet_dod_funnel.Day: Date: performance record (one row per outlet per day)
outlet_dod_funnel.Restaurant_code: ID for rest brand (may have multiple outlets)
outlet_dod_funnel.Outlet_Area: Area within city where outlet is located
outlet_dod_funnel.Outlet_Impressions: # times outlet was shown to users
outlet_dod_funnel.Rel_OV: Outlet Visits # times users opened outlet page
outlet_dod_funnel.Rel_PI: Page Item views # item listing views inside outlet
outlet_dod_funnel.Item_Clicked: # times a specific item was clicked
outlet_dod_funnel.Rel_New_PI: Page Item views from new users
outlet_dod_funnel.Rel_New_ATC: Add To Cart from new users
outlet_dod_funnel.Rel_Rep_PI: Page Item views from repeat users
outlet_dod_funnel.Rel_Rep_ATC: Add To Cart from repeat users
outlet_dod_funnel.New_Platform_Orders: Total completed platform orders from new users
outlet_dod_funnel.Rep_Platform_Orders: Total completed platform orders from repeat users
outlet_dod_funnel.New_Outlet_Orders: Orders placed at outlet by new users
outlet_dod_funnel.Rep_Outlet_Orders: Orders placed at outlet by repeat users

food_order_item.order_table_item_code: Item code as stored in ord table helps distinguish item versions
food_order_item.modifier_item_code: Identifier for modifier item (e.g., extra cheese, add-ons). Null if base item
food_order_item.price: Price item (stored as STRING must CAST to NUMERIC before aggregation)
food_order_item.length_of_char: Length of item name string (technical field, not business metric)
food_order_item.combo_check: Flag indicating if item is part of a combo (likely 1 = combo, 0 = standalone)
food_order_item.order_id: Internal system ord ID (may duplicate order_nr)
food_order_item.day: Ord date use as partition filter

rod_category_tagging.id_partner_owner: ID for partner owner join key to fact tables
rod_category_tagging.Type: High-level classification of partner (e.g., brand type or business model)
rod_category_tagging.Category: Business category of partner (e.g., cuisine type or vertical classification)

item_mapping_cuisine.main_cuisine: Primary cuisine classification assigned to item (e.g., Afghan, Indian, Italian)
item_mapping_cuisine.item_code: ID for menu item primary key
item_mapping_cuisine.category: Item category classification (e.g., main course, dessert, beverage)
item_mapping_cuisine.rnum: Row number or ranking indicator (technical field, may represent deduplication or priority ord)

order_distance.order_id: ord ID join key to daily_orders.order_id
order_distance.distance: Del distance (likely in meters confirm unit before business reporting)

food_order_task_type.id_task: task ID primary key and join key to daily_orders.id_task
food_order_task_type.task_type: Type of task associated with ord (e.g., del, pickup)

item_finder.price: Item price as listed in menu
item_finder.is_active_cache: Flag indicating if item is currently active in cache
item_finder.date_end_at: Date when item expired or became inactive
item_finder.image_updated_at: TS: item image was last updated
item_finder.image: Image file path or URL reference
item_finder.item_identifier: composite ID for item record primary key

food_order_discount_detail.id_food_order_discount: ID for discount record primary key
food_order_discount_detail.order_nr: Ord number associated with discount join key to daily_orders
food_order_discount_detail.apply_order: Indicates application sequence or priority discount
food_order_discount_detail.applied_value: Total discount value applied to ord
food_order_discount_detail.outlet_funded_value: Portion of discount funded by outlet
food_order_discount_detail.channel_funded_value: Portion of discount funded by marketing/channel
food_order_discount_detail.is_vip: Flag indicating whether discount is VIP-specific (1 = VIP, 0 = non-VIP)
food_order_discount_detail.funding_proxy_discount_code: Proxy discount code used for funding attribution
food_order_discount_detail.created_at: TS: discount record was created (partition column)
food_order_discount_detail.updated_at: TS: discount record was last updated

mpnoon_discount.code: Internal discount code join key to ord discount table
mpnoon_discount.name: Internal discount name
mpnoon_discount.title: Display title discount
mpnoon_discount.discount_label: Internal label for categorizing discount (e.g., internal_noon)
mpnoon_discount.discount_type: Type of discount (e.g., del, item-level, ord-level)
mpnoon_discount.configs: JSON configuration defining flat/percent discount and limits
mpnoon_discount.opt_in_criteria: JSON defining eligibility criteria (cities, outlets, cuisines, validity)
mpnoon_discount.apply_criteria: JSON defining application rules (VIP only, usage limits, etc.)
mpnoon_discount.is_viewable: Flag indicating if discount is visible to customers (1 = yes)
mpnoon_discount.is_active_cache: Flag indicating if discount is active in cache
mpnoon_discount.restaurant_funded_percent: Percentage of discount funded by rest
mpnoon_discount.id_bank: Bank ID if discount is bank-funded
mpnoon_discount.country_code: Country code where discount is applicable
mpnoon_discount.is_active: Flag indicating if discount is currently active
mpnoon_discount.is_deleted: Flag indicating if discount is deleted
mpnoon_discount.is_editable: Flag indicating whether discount can be edited
mpnoon_discount.is_applied_post_delivery: Flag indicating if discount is applied after del completion

food_discount_by_restaurant.code: Internal discount code join key to ord discount table
food_discount_by_restaurant.name: Internal name discount
food_discount_by_restaurant.configs: JSON configuration defining discount structure (percent, flat, item mapping, limits)
food_discount_by_restaurant.apply_criteria: JSON defining usage limits and eligibility rules
food_discount_by_restaurant.id_schedule: Schedule ID controlling discount validity period
food_discount_by_restaurant.is_active_cache: Flag indicating if discount is active in cache
food_discount_by_restaurant.channels: JSON array of channels where discount is available (e.g., ['noon'])
food_discount_by_restaurant.outlets: JSON array of outlet codes where discount applies
food_discount_by_restaurant.is_active: Flag indicating whether discount is currently active
food_discount_by_restaurant.is_deleted: Flag indicating if discount is deleted
food_discount_by_restaurant.schedule_hash: Hash ID for discount scheduling configuration
food_discount_by_restaurant.template_code: Template ID for discount creation logic

daily_orders_items.id_food_order: Internal numeric ID for food ord
daily_orders_items.Item_type: Type of item (e.g., main, addon, modifier)
daily_orders_items.Item_Position: Display position of item in menu
daily_orders_items.qty_new: Quantity of new cust item orders
daily_orders_items.QTY: Total quantity of item ordered in ord
daily_orders_items.Total_Price: Total revenue generated from this item line (price × quantity)
daily_orders_items.address_version: Version of del address used in ord
daily_orders_items.payment_method_code: Payment method used (e.g., postpaid, card, wallet)

nat_events_complete.sid: Session ID COUNT(DISTINCT sid) for session count [COUNT_DIST]
nat_events_complete.day: Event date partition column, always filter [PART]
nat_events_complete.locale: Country-language code. For UAE filter: locale LIKE '%ae%'
nat_events_complete.event_misc: JSON string blob containing supplementary event metadata. Never filter or SELECT this column directly. Always use JSON_EXTRACT_SCALAR(event_misc, '$.key') to access nested values i

session_segments_nat.sid: Session ID join to nat_events_complete on sid
session_segments_nat.is_bounce: 1 = bounced session (came, did nothing). Filter is_bounce <> 1 to exclude
session_segments_nat.is_moved: 1 = moved session (not relevant). Filter is_moved <> 1 to exclude
session_segments_nat.hour: Hour of day when session occurred

outlet_status_complete.restaurant_code: rest code primary join key to daily_orders
outlet_status_complete.outlet_name_app: Outlet name shown on cust app
outlet_status_complete.status: Current outlet status — NEVER use status='active' for live outlet filtering. Use bq_activation_status instead.
outlet_status_complete.is_consumer_visible: Whether outlet is visible to consumers [STRING '1' or '0' — NOT an integer. Filter: is_consumer_visible='1' with quotes]
outlet_status_complete.is_accepting_orders: Whether outlet is currently accepting orders
outlet_status_complete.city: City outlet e.g. Dubai, Abu Dhabi
outlet_status_complete.application_code: code identifying onboarding or activation application
outlet_status_complete.application_status: Current status application (pending, approved, rejected, etc.)
outlet_status_complete.legal_entity_code: Legal entity under which rest operates
outlet_status_complete.vip_from: Date from which rest VIP status starts
outlet_status_complete.vip_until: Timestamp until which rest VIP status is valid
outlet_status_complete.is_active: Flag indicating whether menu or entity is active (1 = active, 0 = inactive)
outlet_status_complete.id_menu_version: Identifier for a specific menu version
outlet_status_complete.menu_created_by: User or system that created menu
outlet_status_complete.menu_deleted: Flag indicating whether menu is deleted (1 = deleted, 0 = active)
outlet_status_complete.menu_reject_msg: Reason for menu rejection during QC
outlet_status_complete.outlet_reject_msg: Reason for outlet rejection during quality check
outlet_status_complete.outlet_deleted_by: User or system who deleted outlet
outlet_status_complete.outlet_created_by: User or system who created outlet
outlet_status_complete.bq_activation_status: CORRECT column for active outlet filter. Use: bq_activation_status = 'Activated by Ops'. This replaces status='active' which is WRONG and returns incorrect results.
outlet_status_complete.first_qc_date_new: Updated TS for first quality check
outlet_status_complete.first_qc_by: User who performed first quality check
outlet_status_complete.first_qc_done: Flag indicating completion of first quality check
outlet_status_complete.last_qc_date: Timestamp of most recent quality check
outlet_status_complete.last_qc_by: User who performed last quality check
outlet_status_complete.bq_activation_date: Date when outlet was activated in BigQuery
outlet_status_complete.visibility_off_date: TS: outlet visibility was turned off
outlet_status_complete.visibility_off_by: User or system who disabled outlet visibility
outlet_status_complete.restaurant_active: Flag indicating whether rest is active
outlet_status_complete.mistakenly_created_pid: Flag for mistakenly created partner ID
outlet_status_complete.is_not_deleted: Flag indicating outlet is not deleted
outlet_status_complete.is_in_schedule: Flag indicating outlet is in schedule
outlet_status_complete.first_operational_at: TS: outlet became operational for first time
outlet_status_complete.operational_once: Flag indicating outlet was operational at least once
outlet_status_complete.consumer_first_visible_at: TS: outlet became consumer visible for first time
outlet_status_complete.recent_action_done_by_bq: Recent action performed by BigQuery automation
outlet_status_complete.outlet_status_qc_processed_by: name of QC processor for outlet status
outlet_status_complete.menu_qc_processed_by: name of QC processor for menu

daily_hubz_rca.Food_Sessions: Total food sessions for day at this hub
daily_hubz_rca.Rel_OA: Funnel step: relevant sessions that opened app (top of funnel)
daily_hubz_rca.Rel_PI: Funnel step: relevant sessions that viewed a page item
daily_hubz_rca.Rel_ATC: Funnel step: relevant sessions that added to cart
daily_hubz_rca.Rel_C: Funnel step: relevant sessions that started checkout
daily_hubz_rca.Rel_Txn: Funnel step: relevant sessions that completed a transaction
daily_hubz_rca.All_Orders: Total orders at this hub on this day
daily_hubz_rca.DOW: Day of week derived from date
daily_hubz_rca.Reln_PI: Relevant new user page item impressions
daily_hubz_rca.Relr_PI: Relevant repeat user page item impressions
daily_hubz_rca.CRMn_PI: CRM new user page item impressions
daily_hubz_rca.CRMr_PI: CRM repeat user page item impressions
daily_hubz_rca.FFn_PI: First-food new user page item impressions
daily_hubz_rca.FFr_PI: First-food repeat user page item impressions
daily_hubz_rca.N2Fn_PI: N2F new user page item impressions
daily_hubz_rca.N2Fr_PI: N2F repeat user page item impressions

abc_segments.sessions_last_30d: Number of sessions in last 30 days [INTEGER]
abc_segments.orders_last_30d: Number of orders in last 30 days [INTEGER]

raw_events_v2.event_date: Date of the event, partition key [DATE]

active_discount_outlets.snapshot_date: Partition date; always filter with WHERE snapshot_date = '<date>'
active_discount_outlets.discount_code: Unique identifier for the discount configuration
active_discount_outlets.config_flat: Flat discount amount in local currency; null if percentage-based
active_discount_outlets.config_percent: Percentage discount value (0–100); null if flat-based
active_discount_outlets.config_price_limit: Maximum order value eligible for the discount; null if no cap
active_discount_outlets.config_start_price: Minimum order value required to trigger the discount; null if no minimum
active_discount_outlets.restaurant_funded_percent: Percentage of discount cost borne by the restaurant (0–100)
active_discount_outlets.config_items: Specific item codes the discount applies to; null if applies to all items
active_discount_outlets.end_date: Date the discount expires; null means no expiry
active_discount_outlets.is_active: 1 if the discount is currently active, 0 otherwise
active_discount_outlets.is_active_cache: Cached active flag; mirrors is_active, used for performance
